reasoning: ROT?FL matches ROTFL with the optional T included
TE(HE+)+ matches TEHEHE with TE followed by HE repeated
MWA(HA)+ matches MWAHA with one HA unit
K(EK)*E matches KEKE with one EK in the middle
L(OL)+ matches LOLOL with OL repeated twice
LAW*L matches LAWL with one W
HAHA* matches HAHA with one A after HAH
H(EH)+ matches HEH with one EH unit
LO+L matches LOL with one O
HE(HE)+ matches HEHE with one additional HE
(AH)+A+ matches AHA with one AH and one A
HA+ matches HA with one A
(JA)+ matches JAJA with JA repeated twice
(HO)+ matches HOHO with HO repeated twice
(HAR+)+ matches HARHAR with HAR repeated twice
LOL*LO?(OL)?O+L: Starting with LO, zero L's gives LO, no LO, no OL, minimum one O, then L = LOOL
(A?HA)+(LO)?O*: Minimum is one unit of A?HA where A is absent, giving HA, no LO, no O's = HA
